authorization_boundary: This corpus is non-authorizing research and is not imported by production code.

sources.title: Workpiece Fixture Design Principles
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: A fixture should establish deliberate locating and clamping roles, avoid redundant location, and make correct loading easier to verify.
sources.applicability: Public conceptual basis for datum, locating, clamping, foolproofing, and loading records.
sources.limitations: Manufacturer guidance is not a universal shop rule and is not a substitute for project-specific engineering.
sources.licensing_note: Only publisher, title, canonical URL, and original FXD paraphrase are reused; no handbook, figures, tables, calculations, or product data are copied.

sources.title: 3D welding tables
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Modular table systems illustrate why a fixture must record its table interface and mounting strategy instead of assuming a universal base standard.
sources.applicability: Metadata-only precedent for explicit table-grid interfaces and modular mounting.
sources.limitations: No product dimensions, capacity claims, hole patterns, images, catalogs, or CAD are reused.
sources.licensing_note: Product-family metadata and original FXD interpretation only; supplier content remains governed by the publisher.

sources.title: Welding applications
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Commercial clamps belong in welding-context decisions through explicit motion, contact, mounting, and access interfaces, with exact geometry only when authorized.
sources.applicability: Metadata-only support for commercial clamp roles and provisional open/closed envelopes.
sources.limitations: No force, cycle, performance, geometry, or suitability claim is imported into FXD.
sources.licensing_note: Application-page metadata and original FXD paraphrase only; no catalog, image, specification, or CAD redistribution.

sources.title: Standard fixturing components
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Standard supports, locators, stops, and workholding elements should be modeled by distinct functional roles and replaceable interfaces.
sources.applicability: Category precedent for component taxonomy, serviceability, and role separation.
sources.limitations: The record does not reproduce exact products, dimensions, materials, claims, images, or CAD.
sources.licensing_note: Only category metadata and original FXD interpretation are reused; all supplier content remains excluded.

sources.title: ISO 10218-2:2025 - Industrial robot applications and robot cells
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Robot application integration has safety responsibilities beyond fixture geometry; any future robot context pack must remain evidence support rather than safety certification.
sources.applicability: Standards watch item for optional robot-context validation planning.
sources.limitations: No normative content is reproduced, interpreted as law, or implemented.
sources.licensing_note: Citation metadata only. Licensed standards and qualified safety review would be required for future implementation.

sources.title: ISO 1101:2017 - Geometrical tolerancing
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Geometrical specification and verification are separate concerns; future inspection-template work needs licensed standards review before asserting conformance.
sources.applicability: Standards watch item for inspection and profile-check architecture.
sources.limitations: No normative symbols, requirements, examples, or rules are reproduced or implemented.
sources.licensing_note: Citation metadata only. ISO content remains excluded from the research corpus.

sources.title: ISO 5459:2024 - Datums and datum systems
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Future datum-related claims require a governed standards position; this record identifies the relevant standard family without importing its normative rules.
sources.applicability: Standards watch item for future datum terminology and licensed requirements review.
sources.limitations: No normative ISO content is used, reproduced, summarized into rules, or treated as implemented.
sources.licensing_note: Citation metadata only. ISO content is copyrighted and requires separately authorized access and review before implementation.

sources.title: Fixturing components
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Reusable workholding is easier to manage when mounting, locating, support, and replacement duties are represented separately.
sources.applicability: Category precedent for typed interfaces and replacement compatibility.
sources.limitations: No catalog selection, exact part, dimension, performance statement, or CAD is included.
sources.licensing_note: Category metadata and original FXD paraphrase only; vendor-owned content is not redistributed.

sources.title: Draft 2020-12
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Draft 2020-12 provides a versioned vocabulary for declaring structural constraints and reusable schema definitions for the research artifacts.
sources.applicability: Schema dialect used by the eight research schemas.
sources.limitations: Schema validity does not prove engineering validity, geometric correctness, or production suitability.
sources.licensing_note: Only the public schema URI and specification metadata are referenced; no specification text is copied.

sources.title: Application Framework
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: OCAF demonstrates a document-oriented pattern for persistent application data, dependencies, recomputation, and undo without making transient shape objects the sole identity authority.
sources.applicability: Architecture precedent for evaluating future persistent identities and revision-aware CAD data.
sources.limitations: This package does not select OCAF, change the current project model, or promise stable topology across every edit.
sources.licensing_note: Official documentation metadata and original FXD paraphrase only; future implementation requires independent license and architecture review.

sources.title: Extended Data Exchange (XDE) user guide
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: XDE shows that shapes, assemblies, and attached properties can share one document structure, which is relevant to future neutral asset provenance and assembly identity.
sources.applicability: Architecture precedent for multi-asset assembly metadata evaluation.
sources.limitations: No runtime adoption, persistence migration, or topology guarantee is authorized here.
sources.licensing_note: Official documentation metadata and original FXD paraphrase only.

sources.title: Machine Guarding - Overview
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Guarding and hazardous machine motion remain separate safety responsibilities; FXD context assets may expose conflicts but cannot certify safeguards.
sources.applicability: Boundary source for guarding, keep-out, service, and operator-envelope records.
sources.limitations: No legal conclusion or machine-specific guarding design is created.
sources.licensing_note: Federal-source metadata and original FXD paraphrase only; current regulations and qualified safety review remain authoritative.

sources.title: Robotics - Overview
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Robot context is relevant during normal and non-routine states, including setup and maintenance, so one nominal pose is not complete access evidence.
sources.applicability: Boundary source for movement states, maintenance envelopes, and human confirmation.
sources.limitations: FXD does not perform robot safety assessment, programming, risk reduction, or compliance certification.
sources.licensing_note: Federal-source metadata and original FXD paraphrase only.

sources.title: Welding, Cutting, and Brazing - Overview
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: Welding process context includes hazards and controls beyond geometric torch reach, so access evidence cannot be represented as safety approval.
sources.applicability: Boundary source for separating geometric access review from welding safety and procedure approval.
sources.limitations: This research does not interpret legal duties, copy regulatory text, or claim compliance.
sources.licensing_note: Federal-source metadata and original FXD paraphrase only; users must consult current authoritative requirements.

sources.title: Reference Frame
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: A visible hierarchy of reference frames and dependent objects is a useful interaction analogy for positioning process-context assets without flattening their relationships.
sources.applicability: Interaction reference for Issues #61 and #62 only.
sources.limitations: RoboDK is not a dependency, implementation source, robot-programming target, or product to copy.
sources.licensing_note: Only product-documentation metadata and an original high-level interaction observation are recorded; no UI, code, images, or workflow text is copied.

sources.title: MAX table overview
sources.original_fxd_paraphrase: A modular welding base is a project context and interface choice; FXD must retain the chosen mounting evidence without converting one table family into a universal standard.
sources.applicability: Product-family precedent for table mounting and reusable fixture placement.
sources.limitations: No dimensions, capacities, photographs, marketing claims, catalogs, or CAD are reused.
sources.licensing_note: Product-family metadata and original FXD interpretation only.

engineering_principles.name: Preserve source authority
engineering_principles.summary: Imported product and exact tooling files remain immutable evidence; derived fixture features and annotations live separately.
applicability: all fixture and context asset classes
limitations: does not guarantee stable topology after source replacement

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Locate before clamp
engineering_principles.summary: The product should seat on its intended supports and locators before hold-down force is applied.
limitations: sequence still requires geometry and process-specific review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Make degrees of freedom explicit
engineering_principles.summary: Every locating scheme records controlled, redundant, contradictory, and intentionally floating motion instead of relying on visual plausibility.
limitations: a declared DOF map still requires deterministic verification

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Map every clamp reaction
engineering_principles.summary: Each clamp contact identifies the support or locator region that receives its load and flags unsupported deformation risk.
limitations: does not calculate certified clamp force or structural capacity

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Separate support, locate, stop, and clamp roles
engineering_principles.summary: A component may have multiple declared functions, but no function is inferred merely from shape or proximity.
limitations: combined functions require explicit human review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Treat access and removal as first-class
engineering_principles.summary: A concept is incomplete until required product, tool, operator, process, service, and unload paths are represented at relevant states.
limitations: geometric access does not establish safety or process approval

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Keep geometry authority visible
engineering_principles.summary: Exact imported CAD, supplier-authorized CAD, metadata, and provisional envelopes remain visibly and deterministically distinct.
limitations: authority classification cannot be upgraded by appearance

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Trace every parametric feature
engineering_principles.summary: Generated primitives retain their inputs, parameters, units, rule identities, assumptions, warnings, and edit history.
limitations: traceability does not make an unsupported feature editable

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Keep shop preferences scoped
engineering_principles.summary: Materials, stock sizes, clearances, finishes, and component preferences remain attributed inputs rather than universal engineering rules.
limitations: project engineering can override a shop preference only with visible provenance

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Use immutable item revisions
engineering_principles.summary: A changed library definition creates a new revision; existing project placements remain pinned until an explicit migration is accepted.
limitations: migration compatibility still requires interface and validation checks

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Match interfaces before bounding shape
engineering_principles.summary: Replacement compatibility requires mounting and functional interface equivalence, not a similar preview or envelope.
limitations: matching records do not prove load, tolerance, or process adequacy

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Validate all required movement states
engineering_principles.summary: Collision and clearance evidence names the open, closed, loading, process, unloading, and service states it actually covers.
limitations: unmodeled states remain missing evidence rather than passes

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Keep outputs coherent
engineering_principles.summary: STEP, DXF, BOM, drawings, markings, and review reports derive from one pinned revision and expose omissions explicitly.
limitations: coherence does not authorize production release

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Keep private geometry local first
engineering_principles.summary: Private fixture, customer, employer, and supplier-controlled assets remain outside the public repository and provider payloads by default.
limitations: selected release still requires explicit owner permission and disclosure review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_principles.name: Require human release authority
engineering_principles.summary: Library confidence, deterministic validation, and AI ranking provide evidence but never certify or release a fixture automatically.
limitations: qualified engineering and safety responsibilities remain external approval boundaries

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: 3-2-1 with declared float
fixture_patterns.summary: Use independent primary, secondary, and tertiary contacts while recording any direction intentionally left free for loading, tolerance, or thermal response.
applicability: prismatic and fabricated parts with usable datum opportunities
limitations: not a universal contact count or automatic layout

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Round and relieved pin pair
fixture_patterns.summary: Use one round locating feature and one relieved or directional feature when two holes should not redundantly lock the same in-plane motion.
limitations: fit, tolerance, wear, and thermal behavior require project evidence

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Clamp into named support
fixture_patterns.summary: Place clamp contact so force resolves into a named support or stable locator region rather than bending unsupported material.
applicability: sheet, plate, tube, and fabricated assemblies
limitations: does not prove required clamp force

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Replaceable wear contact
fixture_patterns.summary: Make high-wear support, locator, and stop contacts removable without redefining their parent datum and mounting interfaces.
applicability: repeat-production and abrasive or spatter-prone service
limitations: replacement still makes dependent evidence stale

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Continuous base with discrete nests
fixture_patterns.summary: Connect repeated product-specific stations to one explicit mounted structure while preserving station identities and service access.
limitations: connected geometry does not establish structural adequacy

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Validated tab-and-slot riser
fixture_patterns.summary: A laser-cut riser records engagement, clearance, insertion direction, assembly sequence, weld access, and shop allowance provenance.
limitations: clearance values are shop inputs, not embedded universal rules

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

engineering_details.validation_boundary: No cited public source establishes a universal tab-and-slot clearance or construction rule.

fixture_patterns.name: Asymmetric loading cue
fixture_patterns.summary: Use visible, non-damaging asymmetry where reversed, incomplete, or wrong-family loading is reasonably possible.
limitations: human factors and product damage risk require review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Protected process corridor
fixture_patterns.summary: Reserve explicit tool, weld, inspection, or assembly approach regions through all relevant fixture movement states.
limitations: envelope clearance alone does not prove process quality

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Lift-out release path
fixture_patterns.summary: Define the finished-product release state and path separately from the raw-part loading state to catch post-process trapping.
limitations: real path planning may require representative geometry and sampling

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Adjustable then lockable
fixture_patterns.summary: Adjustment features expose range, nominal setting, lock method, prove-out status, and revalidation trigger.
limitations: adjustability can reduce repeatability and requires explicit acceptance

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Shimmed replaceable datum block
fixture_patterns.summary: Use a pinned or otherwise repeatable parent mount with recorded shim state so service changes remain measurable and reversible.
limitations: shim values require measured evidence

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Modular station assembly
fixture_patterns.summary: Group a validated nest, mounting frame, contacts, and tooling interfaces into a revisioned station module without hiding project-specific dependencies.
limitations: module reuse does not transfer prior validation automatically

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Build and check role separation
fixture_patterns.summary: Combined tooling declares which contacts establish assembly position and which features provide independent inspection evidence.
limitations: standards requirements are not embedded and inspection independence needs qualified review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Machine envelope fit review
fixture_patterns.summary: Evaluate workholding against only the machine, pallet, spindle, tool, door, and service states needed for the project question.
limitations: does not replace machine simulation, manuals, or safety review

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

fixture_patterns.name: Provisional-to-exact gate
fixture_patterns.summary: A provisional envelope may be replaced by exact authorized geometry only through an explicit authority change, identity link, and stale-evidence transition.
limitations: visual similarity cannot authorize the replacement

provenance.usage_note: Public-source metadata and original FXD wording; not component geometry or manufacturing authority.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic torch head and approach envelope

movement_states.description: Tool approaches a confirmed process region.
Tool is at a representative process pose.

validation_limitations: provisional geometry cannot establish exact clearance or weld procedure suitability

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic robot wrist context

movement_states.description: One review pose only, without kinematic path authority.

validation_limitations: no kinematics, singularity, path planning, safety, or offline programming authority

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic modular table context

movement_states.description: Table is fixed for fixture placement review.

validation_limitations: no universal grid, load rating, or supplier compatibility is inferred

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic positioner sweep

movement_states.description: Conservative review sweep without control authority.

validation_limitations: control limits, payload, dynamics, and safety remain external

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic machine workspace
validation_limitations: machine manuals, exact travel, tooling, guarding, and safety requirements remain authoritative

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic operator reach and handling envelope
validation_limitations: not an ergonomic, anthropometric, or safety certification

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic guarding and service zone

movement_states.description: Representative access state requiring human confirmation.

validation_limitations: does not design or certify safeguarding

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

process_context_patterns.name: Synthetic inspection probe and approach
validation_limitations: does not establish measurement uncertainty, calibration, or acceptance

frame.frame_purpose: Synthetic process-context placement and review frame.

complete_item_examples.name: Synthetic parametric support pad

local_coordinate_system.frame_purpose: Parametric component local placement and manufacturing frame.

mounting_interfaces.fastener_intent: Shop-selected removable fastener; no universal size asserted.

functional_interfaces.role: primary or auxiliary support as assigned by the project

movement_states.description: The parametric support contact is fixed in its authored revision.

complete_item_examples.summary: A complete synthetic example showing how an FXD primitive carries stable mounting, contact, revision, validation, and output contracts.
limitations: not a production component or recommended dimension

provenance.usage_note: Original synthetic parametric example; no supplier or private asset.

clamp_preferences: prefer reusable clamp when access permits
reuse_preferences: reuse commercial tooling; recut low-cost plates when justified
cost_volume_preferences: review custom machining against production quantity

conflicts.resolution: Shop scope overrides defaults while retaining both provenance records.
